SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION INCLUDING ANY ASSIGNORS OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST SERVED APR-20-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ALAC, DINA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION INCLUDING ANY ASSIGNORS OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALAC, DEAN ALAC, DINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2468 GEARY BLVD SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115/SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION INCLUDING ANY ASSIGNORS OR SUCCESSORS IN INTEREST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALAC, DEAN ALAC, DINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AN ISSUE $475.00 COSTS, $4,275.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,750.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER : SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ENTIRE ACTION
